name: Chicken Piquant
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove as much excess fat from the chicken as possible.
2. Season the flour with salt and pepper.
3. Dredge the chicken in the seasoned flour, shaking off any excess.
4. Heat the olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
5. When the oil is very hot, brown the chicken on both sides for about 2 minutes per side.
6. Add the broth, vinegar, gherkins, capers, and crushed garlic to the skillet.
7. Continue sautéing for an additional 5 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve the chicken topped with the sauce.
